description: Nick from the Solana Foundation discusses Solang, a new compiler that allows Solidity developers to build on Solana. The conversation covers the differences between Solidity on Ethereum and Solana, including data types and account structures, while emphasizing the need for minor adjustments in existing Solidity code to accommodate Solana's architecture.
topic_summary: Discussion on Solang, enabling Solidity development on Solana, highlighting differences in coding practices and account management between Ethereum and Solana [t=20:04].
